message.content:
Review /home/user/Decode-App/client/src/index.css and /home/user/Decode-App/client/src/animations.css for:

1. CSS classes referenced in components but not defined in CSS — grep through all .tsx files in client/src/components/ and client/src/App.tsx for className references and cross-reference them against the CSS files.
2. Duplicate class definitions
3. Missing CSS variables referenced (like --t-fast, --t-base, --t-slow, --radius, --radius-sm, --radius-lg, --shadow-md, --font-display, --font-mono)
4. Broken animations or transitions

Report every issue you find with file path, line number, and description.

content.text: The model claude-sonnet-4-5@20250929 is not available on your vertex deployment. Try /model to switch to claude-sonnet-4@20250514, or ask your admin to enable this model.
